commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Telegram forwarded-message handling so direct forwards and debounced forward bursts keep clean agent body text while carrying forwarded attribution through typed context, adds regressions/changelog, and includes small type/fixture cleanup in Matrix, gateway, plugin, and script files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main coalesces forwarded bursts into one synthetic message and only derives one forwarded origin, so distinct per-item forwarded origins are lost before prompt assembly.
